text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you good at art?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Me? Well… Let me tell you what happened 
while we were drawing our friends during 
art class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My friend took one look at my work 
and asked, "Is this an alien or something?" 
Can you imagine?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Surely you know… what this means?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My artistic prowess extends beyond 
the very stars themselves! All hail 
Superstar Artist Bakushin!!
